scripts.db:generate: node -e "console.error('drizzle-kit generate is forbidden in this repo. Migrations are handwritten SQL in packages/db/migrations/. See ADR-0009.'); process.exit(1)"
scripts.db:push: node -e "console.error('drizzle-kit push is forbidden in this repo. Apply migrations via pnpm db:migrate. See ADR-0009.'); process.exit(1)"
